'''√dh-dh-b''' ('''kadhadhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macro|macro]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macro|macro]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadhadhab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhadhab || jidhadhab || shidhadhab || kidhadhab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhadhab || jujudhadhab || shushudhadhab || kukudhadhab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhadhab || judhadhab || shudhadhab || kudhadhab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhadhab || judhadhab || shudhadhab || kudhadhab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhadhab || jedhadhab || shedhadhab || kedhadhab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhadhab || jojodhadhab || shoshodhadhab || kokodhadhab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhadhab || jodhadhab || shodhadhab || kodhadhab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhadhab || jodhadhab || shodhadhab || kodhadhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab || dhadhab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhadhab || jædhadhab || shædhadhab || kædhadhab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhadhab || jajadhadhab || shashadhadhab || kakadhadhab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhadhab || jadhadhab || shadhadhab || kadhadhab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhadhab || jadhadhab || shadhadhab || kadhadhab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhadhab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhadhab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhadhab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhadhabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhadhabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhadhabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhadhabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhadhabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhadhabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhadhabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhadhabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadhabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhadhabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhadhabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhadhabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhadhabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhadhabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhadhabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhadhabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhadhabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhadhabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhadhabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhadhabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhadhabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhadhabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhadhabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhadhabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhadhabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhadhabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhadhabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhadhabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhadhabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadhabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhadhabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhadhabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhadhabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhadhabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhadhabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhadhabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhadhabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhadhabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadhabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhadhabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhadhabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhadhabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhadhabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhadhabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhadhabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhadhabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhadhabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhadhabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhadhabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhadhabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhadhabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhadhabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhadhabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhadhabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhadhabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhadhabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhadhabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhadhabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhadhabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhadhabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
